pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and List.getFirst() is the preferred API.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.general_idea: Replace deprecated Locale constructor with the new Locale.of factory method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.why_exists: The Locale(String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21, and while it may still compile, using the new API is required to adhere to the target JDK's modernization standards and avoid future breakage.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) with the Java 21 List.getFirst() method for improved readability.
